name: Addictol
effects: Removes all addictions
description: A powerful and effective pre-War medicine which cleanses the body of the effects of addiction and the withdrawal symptoms that accompany it.
longDescription: A powerful and effective pre-War medicine which cleanses the body of the effects of addiction and withdrawal symptoms. It can take some time to work and has side-effects such as nausea and dizziness.

name: Antibiotics
effects: Cures all illnesses
description: A dose of potent, broad-spectrum antibiotics that'll help clear out pretty much any infection or disease.
longDescription: A dose of potent, broad-spectrum antibiotics that'll help clear out pretty much any infection or disease. Taking too many can be damaging to health overall, though they're rare enough that this is rarely a problem.

name: Berry Mentats
effects: Reduce difficulty of INT tests by 2 (min 0)
description: A portion of Mentats reformulated to promote brain activity and memory.
longDescription: A portion of Mentats reformulated to promote brain activity and memory. Enhances cognitive function and recall, making it easier to solve complex problems.

name: Buffjet
effects: Reduce difficulty of STR/END tests by 1, +4 Max HP, Gain 3 AP, Extra actions cost 1 less AP
description: A potent cocktail of Buffout and Jet, combining the strength-enhancing effects of steroids with the accelerated reflexes of Jet.
longDescription: A potent, if highly addictive mixture of Buffout and Jet, providing a boost to physical prowess, heightened reflexes, and a burst of adrenaline.

name: Buffout
effects: Re-roll 1d20 on STR/END tests, +3 Max HP
description: A powerful and quick-acting steroid which gained popularity with athletes prior to the Great War. For a few minutes, it makes one stronger and tougher.
longDescription: A powerful and quick-acting steroid which gained popularity with athletes prior to the Great War. For a few minutes, it makes one stronger and tougher.

name: Bufftats
effects: Reduce difficulty of STR/PER/END tests by 1, +4 Max HP
description: An addictive cocktail of Buffout steroids and Mentats, heightening both physical prowess and awareness.
longDescription: An addictive cocktail of Buffout steroids and Mentats, heightening both physical prowess and awareness simultaneously.

name: Calmex
effects: Re-roll 1d20 on PER/AGI tests, +2 DC sneak attack damage
description: A light tranquilizer used to calm the nerves. It isn't potent enough to function as a painkiller, but a dose can quiet a troubled mind.
longDescription: A light tranquilizer used to calm the nerves. Not potent enough to function as a painkiller, but a dose can quiet anxieties and fears, keeping panic from disturbing delicate activities.

name: Daddy-O
effects: Reduce difficulty of PER/INT tests by 1, +1 difficulty to CHA tests
description: A pre-War recreational drug that alters perception and heightens mental acuity, but can lead to confusion and paranoia.
longDescription: Popular with beatniks and intellectuals before the Great War, Daddy-O heightens the user's cognitive faculties, making them more alert and able to process information.

name: Day Tripper
effects: Reduce difficulty of CHA/LCK tests by 1, +1 difficulty to STR tests
description: A mild pre-War relaxant and hallucinogen, Day Tripper was favored by Americans seeking a brief escape from reality. The resulting high made users more laid-back and relaxed.
longDescription: A mild pre-War relaxant and hallucinogen favored by Americans seeking a brief escape from reality. The high makes users more laid-back and relaxed, while also making them less inclined to exert themselves physically.

name: Fury
effects: +3 Physical DR, +3 DC melee damage, +2 difficulty to PER tests
description: An extremely powerful combat stimulant, Fury grants users a sense of invincibility, rendering them nearly immune to pain and recklessly dangerous in melee combat.
longDescription: An extremely powerful combat stimulant that grants users a sense of invincibility, rendering them nearly immune to pain and recklessly dangerous in melee combat, while also rendering them largely oblivious to everything else.

name: Grape Mentats
effects: Reduce difficulty of CHA tests by 2, Re-roll 1d20 on Barter tests
description: A variant of Mentats that enhances social grace and persuasiveness.
longDescription: A variant of Mentats that enhances social grace and persuasiveness. Altered to reduce social anxiety, boost confidence, and make users more aware of body language and social cues.

name: Healing Salve
effects: Heals 2 HP
description: A salve or ointment which can be applied to reduce pain and speed recovery from injury, typically made from several natural herbal ingredients.
longDescription: A salve or ointment which can be applied to reduce pain and speed recovery from injury, typically made from several natural herbal ingredients.

name: Jet
effects: Extra actions cost 1 less AP
description: An inhaled stimulant which creates an altered state of consciousness where time appears to slow, heightening reflexes and allowing the user to act more quickly during a moment of crisis.
longDescription: An inhaled stimulant which creates an altered state of consciousness where time appears to slow, heightening reflexes and allowing the user to act more quickly during a moment of crisis.

name: Jet Fuel
effects: Gain 1 free AP at start of each turn
description: A volatile variant of Jet, Jet Fuel provides a massive burst of energy in the user, allowing them to act more swiftly and decisively.
longDescription: A volatile variant of Jet, Jet Fuel provides a massive burst of energy in the user, allowing them to act more swiftly and decisively.

name: Med-X
effects: +3 Physical DR
description: A potent opiate analgesic which significantly reduces both the perception of pain and the natural emotional response to pain. In short, it's a powerful painkiller.
longDescription: A potent opiate analgesic which significantly reduces both the perception of pain and the natural emotional response to pain. In short, it's a powerful painkiller.

name: Mentats
effects: Re-roll 1d20 on PER/INT tests
description: A popular recreational and performance-enhancing drug before the Great War, Mentats enhance memory and speed mental processes.
longDescription: A popular recreational and performance-enhancing drug before the Great War which enhances memory and speeds mental processes. Popular amongst students and those in jobs requiring intensive thought.

name: Orange Mentats
effects: Reduce difficulty of PER tests by 2, Aim lets you re-roll 1 additional d20
description: A variant of Mentats which heighten awareness and sensory acuity.
longDescription: A variant of Mentats which heighten awareness and sensory acuity. Enhances perception and allows the user to re-roll dice on aimed attacks.

name: Overdrive
effects: +3 DC damage to all attacks, May re-roll up to 3 DC per damage roll
description: An enhanced form of Psycho which massively stimulates aggression, making the user more dangerous in combat.
longDescription: An enhanced form of Psycho which massively stimulates aggression, making the user more dangerous in combat by increasing damage output and allowing re-rolls of combat dice.

name: Psycho
effects: +2 DC damage to all attacks, +3 Physical DR
description: A potent combat stimulant created by the U.S. Army to enhance the effectiveness of soldiers in battle, inducing a state of heightened aggression and reduced pain sensitivity.
longDescription: A potent combat stimulant created by the U.S. Army to enhance the effectiveness of their soldiers. It stimulates aggression and dulls pain receptors, allowing the user to fight harder with less care for their own safety.

name: Psycho Jet
effects: +2 DC damage, +4 Physical DR, Gain 4 AP immediately
description: A powerful, addictive cocktail of Psycho and Jet, which enhances aggression, dulls pain, and augments a target's reflexes and energy levels.
longDescription: A powerful, addictive cocktail of Psycho and Jet which enhances aggression, dulls pain, and augments reflexes and energy levels. The effect is an explosive burst of extreme violence.

name: Psychobuff
effects: +2 DC damage, +4 Max HP, Reduce difficulty of STR/END tests by 1
description: A highly addictive cocktail of Psycho and Buffout steroids, combining the effects of the two drugs to produce a period of extreme strength, durability, and aggression.
longDescription: A highly addictive cocktail of Psycho and Buffout steroids, combining the effects of both drugs to produce a period of extreme strength, durability, and aggression.

name: Psychotats
effects: +2 DC damage, +2 Physical DR, Reduce difficulty of PER tests by 1
description: A combination of Psycho and Mentats, providing enhanced combat performance while maintaining mental clarity.
longDescription: A cocktail of Psycho and Mentats. The heightened awareness and aggression partially cancel one another out, resulting in a short period of high aggression, enhanced sensory acuity, and boosted pain tolerance.

name: Rad-X
effects: +6 Radiation DR
description: A pre-War medication that temporarily fortifies the body against the effects of radiation poisoning.
longDescription: A preventative medicine for those intending to enter areas with heightened risk of radiation exposure. A dose helps you resist the effects of radiation, especially when combined with other protective measures.

name: Rad-X (Diluted)
effects: +3 Radiation DR
description: A diluted version of Rad-X, roughly half as effective but easier to find than the full-strength version.
longDescription: A diluted form of Rad-X, reducing its effectiveness but allowing limited supplies to last longer. About half as effective as standard Rad-X.

name: RadAway
effects: Heals 4 Radiation damage
description: An intravenous drug which purges radiation from the user's body, absorbing radiation as it circulates through the user's bloodstream.
longDescription: An intravenous drug which purges radiation from the user's body, absorbing radiation as it circulates through the bloodstream. Also a potent diuretic, expelling radiation with urine.

name: RadAway (Diluted)
effects: Heals 2 Radiation damage
description: A diluted version of RadAway, roughly half as effective but easier to find than the full-strength version.
longDescription: A diluted form of RadAway, reducing its effectiveness as the user is only taking a partial dose. Only about half as effective as standard RadAway, but easier to find.

name: Skeeto Spit
effects: +2 Max HP
description: A tribal remedy made from the saliva of mutated mosquitoes, known to temporarily bolster one's constitution.
longDescription: Derived from the secretions of a Bloodbug and the curative properties of wasteland plants, Skeeto Spit is a wasteland remedy which dulls the user's ability to feel pain. Effective, lasting, and non-addictive.

name: Stimpak
effects: Heals 4 HP
description: A wonder of pre-War science, a Stimpak is a single-use syringe filled with a variety of potent healing agents, stimulants, and painkillers.
longDescription: A stimulation delivery package, or Stimpak, is a form of fast-acting medication used to bolster the body's own healing and recuperative ability. Countless millions were produced for first aid kits, hospitals, and clinics.

name: Stimpak (Diluted)
effects: Heals 2 HP
description: A diluted version of a Stimpak, roughly half as effective but easier to find than the full-strength version.
longDescription: A diluted Stimpak, reducing its effectiveness as the user is only taking a partial dose. Only about half as effective as a standard Stimpak, but easier to find.

name: Super Stimpak
effects: Heals 8 HP
description: An enhanced version of the standard Stimpak, delivering a more concentrated dose of healing agents for greater effect.
longDescription: An enhanced version of the standard Stimpak with an additional vial of medicine and a leather strap to secure the needle. A more potent cocktail allowing it to heal much more effectively.

name: Stimpak Diffuser
effects: Heals 4 HP to all within Close range
description: This delivery mechanism allows the contents of a Super Stimpak to be dispersed into an aerosol cloud, providing a burst of medicinal vapor over a small area.
longDescription: This delivery mechanism allows the contents of a super Stimpak to be dispersed into an aerosol cloud, providing a burst of medicinal vapor over a small area, healing all within close range.

name: Ultra Jet
effects: Gain 6 AP immediately, Extra actions cost 1 less AP
description: An extremely concentrated form of Jet, it is significantly more potent and affects Ghouls as easily as it does humans.
longDescription: An extremely concentrated form of Jet, significantly more potent, affecting Ghouls as easily as humans due to its potency. Highly addictive with permanent effects.

name: X-Cell
effects: First d20 bought on all tests is free
description: A general-purpose performance enhancer still being developed before the Great War. Development was never finished, but prototype versions were distributed through the black market.
longDescription: A general-purpose performance enhancer still being developed before the Great War. It enhances all aspects of a user's abilities for a few minutes, but is extremely addictive.

name: Beer
effects: Heals 0 HP. Alcoholic
description: One of the oldest beverages created by humans, beer is a carbonated alcoholic drink made from fermented cereal grains, popular pre-War to relax after a hard day's work.
longDescription: One of the oldest beverages created by humans, beer is a carbonated alcoholic drink made from fermented cereal grains, popular pre-War to relax after a hard day's work.

name: Blood Pack
effects: Heals 3 HP
description: A bag of pre-War blood, intended for medical transfusions. Some wastelanders drink it for its nutritional content, though it's hardly a pleasant beverage.
longDescription: A bag of pre-War blood, intended for medical transfusions. Some wastelanders drink it for its nutritional content, though it's hardly a pleasant beverage.

name: Bourbon
effects: Heals 0 HP. Alcoholic. Re-roll 1d20 on END tests
description: A distinctly American type of whiskey, bourbon is a barrel-aged, distilled spirit made mainly of corn. Pre-War, those who favored it tended to get a reputation as being tough or rugged.
longDescription: A distinctly American type of whiskey, bourbon is a barrel-aged, distilled spirit made mainly of corn. Pre-War, those who favored it tended to get a reputation as being tough or rugged.

name: Brahmin Milk
effects: Heals 1 HP. Heals 2 Radiation damage
description: Milk from a brahmin. This drink is a true lifesaver, as it has properties that cleanse radiation poisoning from the body.
longDescription: Milk from a brahmin. This drink is a true lifesaver, as it has properties that cleanse radiation poisoning from the body.

name: Dirty Water
effects: Heals 2 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: Water collected from rivers, lakes, swimming pools, and any other unfiltered water source. It's not recommended to drink dirty water without filtering or purifying it first.
longDescription: Water collected from rivers, lakes, swimming pools, and any other unfiltered water source. It's not recommended to drink dirty water without filtering or purifying it first.

name: Moonshine
effects: Heals 0 HP. Alcoholic. +2 Max HP
description: High-proof distilled spirits produced in an illicit or makeshift manner. Due to their unorthodox origins, moonshine can be dangerous to consume, often contaminated with dangerous chemicals.
longDescription: High-proof distilled spirits produced in an illicit or makeshift manner. Due to their unorthodox origins, moonshine can be dangerous to consume, often contaminated with dangerous chemicals.

name: Nuka-Cherry
effects: Heals 3 HP. Immediately gain +2 AP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: Produced by the Nuka-Cola Corporation after it bought the patent for a rival beverage, Nuka-Cherry is a blend of the typical Nuka-Cola recipe with a distinctive cherry flavoring and a bright red color.
longDescription: Produced by the Nuka-Cola Corporation after it bought the patent for a rival beverage, Nuka-Cherry is a blend of the typical Nuka-Cola recipe with a distinctive cherry flavoring and a bright red color.

name: Nuka-Cola
effects: Heals 2 HP. Immediately gain +1 AP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: The flagship beverage of the Nuka-Cola Corporation, this carbonated soft drink is instantly recognizable by its distinctive brown glass bottle and sweet, refreshing taste.
longDescription: The flagship beverage of the Nuka-Cola Corporation, this carbonated soft drink is instantly recognizable by its distinctive brown glass bottle and sweet, refreshing taste.

name: Nuka-Cola Quantum
effects: Heals 10 HP. Immediately gain +5 AP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: Introduced the same day the bombs fell, Nuka-Cola Quantum was the newest flavor, with twice the calories, twice the carbohydrates, twice the caffeine, and twice the taste. The drink's distinctive blue glow comes from a safe isotope additive.
longDescription: Introduced the same day the bombs fell, Nuka-Cola Quantum was the newest flavor, with twice the calories, twice the carbohydrates, twice the caffeine, and twice the taste. The drink's distinctive blue glow comes from a safe isotope additive.

name: Purified Water
effects: Heals 3 HP
description: Water which has been cleansed of any contaminants or radiation. Sometimes found in sealed cans or bottles in the wasteland.
longDescription: Water which has been cleansed of any contaminants or radiation. Sometimes found in sealed cans or bottles in the wasteland.

name: Refreshing Beverage
effects: Heals 11 HP. Heals 10 Radiation damage. Cures all addictions
description: A pre-War sports drink designed to rehydrate and restore energy. Its electrolytic properties make it highly effective at revitalizing the body.
longDescription: A pre-War sports drink designed to rehydrate and restore energy. Its electrolytic properties make it highly effective at revitalizing the body.

name: Rum
effects: Heals 0 HP. Alcoholic. Re-roll 1d20 on AGI tests
description: A liquor made from fermenting then distilling sugarcane molasses. Rum has strong historic ties to naval and maritime traditions.
longDescription: A liquor made from fermenting then distilling sugarcane molasses. Rum has strong historic ties to naval and maritime traditions.

name: Vodka
effects: Heals 2 HP. Alcoholic
description: A clear distilled alcoholic beverage, made from fermented rye, wheat, potatoes, or sugar beet molasses.
longDescription: A clear distilled alcoholic beverage, made from fermented rye, wheat, potatoes, or sugar beet molasses.

name: Whiskey
effects: Heals 0 HP. Alcoholic. Re-roll up to two d20 on STR tests (in total)
description: A triple-distilled alcoholic beverage made using grain mash. Some wasteland distilleries exist producing post-War versions using corn and other available grains.
longDescription: A triple-distilled alcoholic beverage made using grain mash. Some wasteland distilleries exist producing post-War versions using corn and other available grains.

name: Wine
effects: Heals 0 HP. Alcoholic. Immediately gain +1 AP
description: An alcoholic beverage made from fermented fruits, typically grapes. Pre-War bottles are still found in cellars and liquor stores across the wasteland.
longDescription: An alcoholic beverage made from fermented fruits, typically grapes. Pre-War bottles are still found in cellars and liquor stores across the wasteland.

name: Melon Juice
effects: Heals 3 HP. Heal 1 HP at start of each turn
description: Juice made from pressing the pulp of a melon. A refreshing and healthy drink which promotes the body's natural healing.
longDescription: Juice made from pressing the pulp of a melon. A refreshing and healthy drink which promotes the body's natural healing.

name: Mutfruit Juice
effects: Heals 3 HP. Re-roll 1d20 on all AGI tests
description: Juice made from pressing the pulp of a mutfruit. A sweet and energizing beverage.
longDescription: Juice made from pressing the pulp of a mutfruit. A sweet and energizing beverage.

name: Tarberry Juice
effects: Heals 3 HP. Immediately gain +6 AP
description: Juice made from pressing tarberries. Drinking Tarberry juice has a potent stimulant effect, making the drinker energetic and ready for action.
longDescription: Juice made from pressing tarberries. Drinking Tarberry juice has a potent stimulant effect, making the drinker energetic and ready for action.

name: Tato Juice
effects: Heals 3 HP. Group AP pool can hold 1 AP more than normal
description: Juice made from pressing Tatos. Despite the unpleasant taste, Tato juice allows the drinker to dig more deeply into reserves of stamina and push themselves further.
longDescription: Juice made from pressing Tatos. Despite the unpleasant taste, Tato juice allows the drinker to dig more deeply into reserves of stamina and push themselves further.

name: Baked Bloatfly
effects: Heals 6 HP, +2 Radiation DR
description: A bloatfly cooked over an open fire. Not particularly appetizing, but edible.
longDescription: A bloatfly cooked over an open fire. Not particularly appetizing, but edible. The cooking process reduces the radiation content and makes the meat safer to consume, if not more enjoyable.

name: Bloodbug Steak
effects: Heals 10 HP, Max HP +3 until end of following scene
description: A cooked slab of bloodbug meat. Surprisingly nutritious despite its unappealing origin.
longDescription: A cooked slab of bloodbug meat. Surprisingly nutritious despite its unappealing origin. The cooking process transforms the slimy meat into something reasonably edible.

name: Brain Fungus
effects: Heals 3 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: A mutated fungus that grows in dark, damp places. Consuming it raw has adverse effects on mental clarity.
longDescription: A mutated fungus that grows in dark, damp places. Consuming it raw has adverse effects on mental clarity.

name: Carrot
effects: Heals 3 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: A root vegetable grown in soil. Provides decent nutrition and is relatively easy to grow. A staple of wasteland agriculture.
longDescription: A crunchy, edible root vegetable. Carrots are commonly grown in wasteland farms and provide decent nutrition. They can be eaten raw or used in cooking various recipes.

name: Cooked Softshell Meat
effects: Heals 9 HP, Gain +1 AP at start of next scene
description: The softer meat from mirelurks, cooked into a rough steak. A high-energy meal, those who eat cooked softshell meat are often invigorated and eager for action for a while afterwards.
longDescription: The softer meat from mirelurks, cooked into a rough steak. A high-energy meal, those who eat cooked softshell meat are often invigorated and eager for action for a while afterwards.

name: Corn
effects: Heals 3 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: A highly versatile crop cultivated across the Americas for centuries. Corn remains largely unchanged by the War, and it remains a staple of wasteland agriculture.
longDescription: A highly versatile crop cultivated across the Americas for centuries. Corn remains largely unchanged by the War, and it remains a staple of wasteland agriculture.

name: Crispy Squirrel Bits
effects: Heals 6 HP
description: Chunks of squirrel meat cooked until crispy. A decent snack, if not particularly filling.
longDescription: Chunks of squirrel meat cooked until crispy. A decent snack, if not particularly filling. Squirrels are small creatures, so it takes several to make a meal.

name: Deathclaw Omelette
effects: Heals 11 HP. If next scene is combat, regain 1 HP at start of each turn
description: An omelette made from a deathclaw egg. In addition to being highly nutritious, it stimulates the natural healing processes of the body.
longDescription: An omelette made from a deathclaw egg. In addition to being highly nutritious, it stimulates the natural healing processes of the body.

name: Deathclaw Steak
effects: Heals 14 HP. May re-roll 1d20 on all STR tests until end of next scene
description: A cooked slab of deathclaw meat. The process of cooking has enhanced its nutritional value and eliminated the radiation hazard.
longDescription: A cooked slab of deathclaw meat. The process of cooking has enhanced its nutritional value and eliminated the radiation hazard.

name: Glowing Fungus
effects: Heals 1 HP, Heals 1 Radiation damage
description: A bioluminescent fungus that grows in irradiated areas. It has medicinal properties but also contains significant radiation.
longDescription: A bioluminescent fungus that grows in irradiated areas. It has medicinal properties but also contains significant radiation.

name: Gourd
effects: Heals 3 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: A large edible fruit, which is fleshy with a hard skin, like a pumpkin. The pulp inside can be eaten or used in cooking.
longDescription: A large edible fruit, which is fleshy with a hard skin, like a pumpkin. The pulp inside can be scooped out and eaten or used in cooking, while the outer skin is often carved and used as decoration.

name: Grilled Radroach
effects: Heals 5 HP
description: A grilled chunk of meat taken from a radroach. Not especially appetizing, but sufficiently nutritious for those with few other choices.
longDescription: A grilled chunk of meat taken from a radroach. Not especially appetizing, especially if you know where it came from, but sufficiently nutritious and filling for those with few other choices.

name: Grilled Radstag
effects: Heals 11 HP. Carry weight increases by +25 until end of next scene
description: A cooked portion of radstag meat. The lean, gamey meat provides nourishment and a feeling of vitality.
longDescription: A grilled rack of ribs from a radstag. Easy enough to make when you've got the main ingredient, but tasty and satisfying enough that your burdens feel a little lighter once you've finished eating.

name: Hubflower
effects: Heals 1 HP
description: A mutated flower that grows in the wasteland. It has mild healing properties when consumed.
longDescription: A mutated flower that grows in the wasteland. It has mild healing properties when consumed and is also used as an ingredient in various recipes and chems.

name: Iguana Bits
effects: Heals 4 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: Small pieces of dried or cooked iguana meat. A lightweight, portable source of protein.
longDescription: Small pieces of dried or cooked iguana meat. A lightweight, portable source of protein favored by travelers. The vendor 'Iguana Bob' is famous throughout the wasteland for these.

name: Iguana on a Stick
effects: Heals 6 HP
description: A skewer of iguana meat roasted over a fire. A common street food in many settlements.
longDescription: A skewer of iguana meat roasted over a fire. A common street food in many settlements. Lightweight and portable, making it a good travel ration.

name: Iguana Soup
effects: Heals 10 HP
description: A simple soup made with iguana meat and vegetables. Warm and filling.
longDescription: A simple soup made with iguana meat and vegetables. Warm and filling. A common dish in settlements where iguanas are plentiful.

name: Melon
effects: Heals 3 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: A large, green, juicy fruit with a hard outer rind. Once cut open, melons are very satisfying, sating hunger and quenching thirst.
longDescription: A large, green, juicy fruit with a hard outer rind. Melons are grown in wasteland farms or found growing wild. Either way, once cut open they're often very satisfying, sating hunger and quenching thirst all in one go.

name: Mirelurk Cake
effects: Heals 12 HP. Can breathe underwater until end of next scene
description: A dense cake or patty made from ground mirelurk meat. Surprisingly tasty and filling.
longDescription: Flakes and fragments of mirelurk meat, mixed with mirelurk egg to bind it together into a patty and then cooked. In addition to some modest nutritional value, eating mirelurk cake allows you to survive underwater for longer.

name: Mirelurk Egg Omelette
effects: Heals 7 HP. Immediately add 2 AP to the group pool
description: An omelette made from a mirelurk egg. Said to sharpen the mind and improve focus.
longDescription: Eggs found in mirelurk nests. Normally found in clutches of 2-3, these eggs hatch into mirelurk hatchlings if left undisturbed. They are a key ingredient in Mirelurk Egg Omelette and Mirelurk Cake.

name: Mirelurk Meat
effects: Heals 6 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: Meat taken from inside the carapace of a mirelurk. Difficult to extract but delicious and nutritious.
longDescription: The meat from dead mirelurks. This tends to be tougher and of poorer quality than softshell mirelurk meat, but it is still entirely edible. Used as an ingredient in various recipes.

name: Mirelurk Queen Steak
effects: Heals 14 HP. Reduce difficulty of all END tests by 1 until end of next scene
description: The rare, nutrient-rich meat of a mirelurk Queen. When properly prepared, it can fortify the body and provide a surge of health and vitality.
longDescription: The rare, nutrient-rich meat of a mirelurk Queen. When properly prepared, it can fortify the body and provide a surge of health and vitality.

name: Mole Rat Chunks
effects: Heals 7 HP. +1 Max AP in group pool until end of current scene
description: Chopped and cooked pieces of mole rat meat. Better than eating it raw, but still an acquired taste.
longDescription: Chopped and cooked pieces of mole rat meat. Better than eating it raw, but still tough and chewy. Leaves a feeling of vigor, as if your reserves of stamina have increased.

name: Mongrel Dog Meat
effects: Heals 4 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: A chunk of meat taken from a mongrel dog. Can be cooked to make Mutt Chops.
longDescription: A chunk of meat taken from a mongrel dog. Can be cooked to make Mutt Chops. Mongrel dogs are common in the wasteland and their meat is a reliable if unglamorous food source.

name: Mutfruit
effects: Heals 3 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: Pronounced 'mute-fruit', and short for mutated fruit, mutfruit is a mutated form of apple, which comes in several different varieties depending on where you are.
longDescription: Pronounced 'mute-fruit', short for mutated fruit, mutfruit is a mutated form of apple which comes in several varieties. These are cultivated for their sweet flavor, use in cooking, and even medicinal properties in some rare cases.

name: Mutant Hound Chops
effects: Heals 8 HP. Heals 2 Radiation damage
description: Cooked chops of mutant hound meat. Still not the tastiest food, but no longer hazardous.
longDescription: Cooked chops of mutant hound meat. Still not the tastiest food, but no longer hazardous. The meat's off-green color and lumpy texture are off-putting, but it's safe once cooked.

name: Mutt Chops
effects: Heals 6 HP
description: Cuts of mongrel dog meat cooked to make them more nutritious and edible.
longDescription: Cuts of mongrel dog meat cooked to make them more nutritious and edible. The cooking process improves both the flavor and the nutritional value.

name: Noodle Cup
effects: Heals 6 HP
description: A simple cup of noodle soup. Moderately filling and thirst-quenching, and simple enough to make if you can find the ingredients.
longDescription: A simple cup of noodle soup. Moderately filling and thirst-quenching, and simple enough to make if you can find the ingredients.

name: Potato Crisps
effects: Heals 3 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: A can of salted or flavored potato chips, sealed in an inert environment for freshness. A common snack pre-War, still found in most places where people lived or worked.
longDescription: A can of salted or flavored potato chips, sealed for freshness. A common snack pre-War, you can still find odd packs in most places where people lived or worked.

name: Radscorpion Egg Omelette
effects: Heals 9 HP. Cure all addictions
description: Made from a radscorpion egg, these omelettes are highly prized by those who make considerable use of combat drugs, as something about the food cleanses the body to remove chemical dependencies and addictions.
longDescription: The egg of a radscorpion. Not easy to get hold of, as they tend to be found in places where there are radscorpions. Can be used to make Radscorpion Egg Omelette.

name: Radscorpion Steak
effects: Heals 12 HP. +2 Energy DR until end of next scene
description: A cooked slab of radscorpion meat. The process of cooking has reduced the radiation below dangerous levels and enhanced the nutritional value.
longDescription: A cooked slab of radscorpion meat. The cooking process reduces the radiation to safe levels and enhances the nutritional value. Eating Radscorpion Steak heightens your resistance to extreme heat for a while.

name: Radstag Stew
effects: Heals 12 HP. +3 Energy DR until end of next scene
description: A hearty stew made with radstag meat and vegetables. Warming and satisfying.
longDescription: Strips of radstag meat with vegetables and some alcohol, cooked to make a thick, hearty stew. Filling and satisfying, the stew also helps fortify the body, making you more resistant to extreme heat for a while.

name: Razorgrain
effects: Heals 3 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: A tall, fast-growing grass similar to wheat, which can be ground down to make flour for making bread and other staple foods.
longDescription: A tall, fast-growing grass similar to wheat, which can be ground down to make flour for bread and other staple foods. An ingredient in a few recipes.

name: Ribeye Steak
effects: Heals 10 HP
description: A grilled piece of meat from a brahmin. The closest thing to a pre-War steak you're likely to find.
longDescription: A grilled piece of meat from a brahmin. The closest thing to a pre-War steak you're likely to find. A good piece of grilled brahmin makes for a satisfying meal.

name: Roasted Mirelurk Meat
effects: Heals 8 HP. Gain +1 AP at start of next scene
description: A cooked portion of meat from a mirelurk. Though not to the same extent as the softshell meat, roasted mirelurk meat invigorates the body and mind.
longDescription: A cooked portion of meat from a mirelurk. Though not to the same extent as the softshell meat, roasted mirelurk meat invigorates the body and mind.

name: Salisbury Steak
effects: Heals 5 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: A ready-to-eat meal of ground beef mixed with breadcrumbs, onion, and egg, served with gravy. Pre-packaged, preserved, and sealed for freshness.
longDescription: A ready-to-eat meal of ground beef mixed with breadcrumbs, onion, and egg, served with gravy. Pre-packaged, preserved, and sealed for freshness.

name: Silt Bean
effects: Heals 3 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: A legume that grows in muddy or silty soil. Provides decent nutrition and can be used in various recipes.
longDescription: Red-brown pods of legumes growing from the vine of a silt bean plant in the wilderness. Not easily cultivated, but used as an ingredient in a few recipes such as radstag stew.

name: Squirrel Bits
effects: Heals 4 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: A few scraps and chunks of squirrel meat. Squirrels, not being especially large creatures, do not have much meat on them.
longDescription: A few scraps and chunks of squirrel meat. Squirrels are not especially large creatures, so there's not much meat on them. Can be cooked into various dishes.

name: Squirrel on a Stick
effects: Heals 7 HP
description: Chunks of squirrel meat skewered on a thin piece of wood for cooking, and then roasted over an open flame. Not enough meat for a decent meal, but certainly enough for a snack.
longDescription: Chunks of squirrel meat skewered on a thin piece of wood for cooking, and then roasted over an open flame. Not enough meat for a decent meal, but certainly enough for a snack.

name: Stingwing Filet
effects: Heals 11 HP. May re-roll 1d20 on all PER tests until end of next scene
description: A cooked piece of stingwing meat. Not the most appetizing of foods, but surprisingly useful for those surviving in the wastelands, as it can sharpen the senses.
longDescription: A cooked piece of stingwing meat. Not the most appetizing of foods, but surprisingly useful for those surviving in the wastelands, as it can sharpen the senses.

name: Tarberry
effects: Heals 3 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: Small purple berries of the Tarberry plant, a water-grown crop similar to pre-War cranberries. A useful ingredient in several recipes.
longDescription: Small purple berries of the Tarberry plant, a water-grown crop similar to pre-War cranberries. A useful ingredient in several recipes, but difficult to cultivate without clean water.

name: Tato
effects: Heals 3 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: A mutated hybrid of the pre-War tomato and potato plants, with the stem and reddish skin of the former and the brownish flesh of the latter. Tatos provide decent nutrition, but taste disgusting.
longDescription: A mutated hybrid of the pre-War tomato and potato plants, with the stem and reddish skin of the former and the brownish flesh of the latter. Tatos provide decent nutrition but taste disgusting. They're easy to grow and are a staple of wasteland agriculture.

name: Vegetable Soup
effects: Heals 7 HP. +2 Radiation DR until end of next scene
description: A simple soup made with carrot and tato. A reasonably filling meal, sating both hunger and thirst, while also helping to fortify the body against radiation poisoning for a while.
longDescription: A simple soup made with carrot and tato. A reasonably filling meal, sating both hunger and thirst, while also helping to fortify the body against radiation poisoning for a while.

name: Yao Guai Ribs
effects: Heals 13 HP. +2 Physical damage resistance until end of next scene
description: A rack of ribs made with Yao Guai meat. Both a satisfying meal and inspire a sense of invincibility, while also boosting your tolerance for pain for a short while.
longDescription: A rack of ribs made with Yao Guai meat. Yao Guai ribs are both a satisfying meal and inspire a sense of invincibility, while also boosting your tolerance for pain for a short while.

name: Yao Guai Roast
effects: Heals 14 HP. +2 CD to melee attacks until end of next scene
description: A roasted piece of Yao Guai meat cooked with carrot and tato. An extremely filling and satisfying meal, and many have claimed that it heightens their killer instinct.
longDescription: A roasted piece of Yao Guai meat cooked with carrot and tato. An extremely filling and satisfying meal, and many claim it heightens their killer instinct and ability to inflict harm for a while after eating.

name: Yum-Yum Deviled Eggs
effects: Heals 4 HP
description: Hard-boiled eggs stuffed with a spicy filling, which were preserved and sealed for freshness before the Great War.
longDescription: Hard-boiled eggs stuffed with a spicy filling, which were preserved and sealed for freshness before the Great War.

name: Bloatfly Meat
effects: Heals 2 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: Meat taken from a bloatfly. Not particularly appetizing, but it's a source of protein.
longDescription: Meat taken from a bloatfly. Not particularly appetizing, but it's a source of protein for those desperate enough. The meat is stringy and has an unpleasant taste.

name: Bloodbug Meat
effects: Heals 7 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: Meat taken from a bloodbug. Slimy and unappealing, but edible when cooked.
longDescription: Meat taken from a bloodbug. Slimy and unappealing, but edible when cooked. Bloodbugs are parasitic creatures, and their meat carries that same unpleasant quality.

name: Brahmin Meat
effects: Heals 3 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: A cut of meat taken from a brahmin. A reliable source of protein in the wasteland.
longDescription: A cut of meat taken from a brahmin. A reliable source of protein in the wasteland. Brahmin are common livestock, and their meat is a staple of wasteland diets.

name: Canned Dog Food
effects: Heals 3 HP
description: A can of processed meat-based food, intended for dogs. Edible in a pinch, but deeply unappealing.
longDescription: A can of processed meat-based food, intended for dogs. Edible in a pinch, but definitely not a first choice for human consumption. Better than starving, though.

name: Cram
effects: Heals 5 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: A can of processed meat, typically containing a mixture of brahmin, radstag, and other meats. The can is sealed for preservation and can last for decades.
longDescription: A can of processed meat, typically containing a mixture of brahmin, radstag, and other meats. The can is sealed for preservation and can last for decades.

name: Dandy Boy Apples
effects: Heals 3 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: Candied apples produced by the Dandy Boy company. An extremely sweet fruit-based snack packaged in a cardboard box.
longDescription: Candied apples produced by the Dandy Boy company. An extremely sweet fruit-based snack packaged in a cardboard box.

name: Deathclaw Egg
effects: Heals 7 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: The egg of a deathclaw. Extremely dangerous to acquire, but highly prized for its nutritional value.
longDescription: The egg of a deathclaw. Extremely dangerous to acquire, but highly prized for its nutritional value.

name: Deathclaw Meat
effects: Heals 9 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: Meat taken from a slain deathclaw. Extremely dangerous to obtain, but highly nutritious and prized across the wasteland.
longDescription: Meat taken from a deathclaw. Extremely dangerous to obtain, but highly nutritious and prized by those who can acquire it. The meat is rich and filling.

name: InstaMash
effects: Heals 4 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: A packet of dehydrated mashed potatoes. Just add water (heated or not) and you have a quick, filling meal.
longDescription: A packet of freeze-dried powdered mashed potato still sealed inside its cardboard box. Just add water! Sometimes, preserved boxes can be found which are not irradiated.

name: Gum Drops
effects: Heals 3 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: A pre-War confection of small drops of congealed gelatin, sweetened and flavored. The most common variety to survive the War were labelled as 'radioactive' for their powerful sour flavor.
longDescription: A pre-War confection, gum drops are small drops of congealed gelatin sweetened and flavored with a variety of overpowering flavors. The most common variety to survive the War were labelled as radioactive for their powerful sour flavor. Long years in cupboards has made this more literal.

name: Fancy Lads Snack Cakes
effects: Heals 3 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: A box of pre-War packaged snack cakes, filled with a sweet, creamy center. Surprisingly well-preserved despite their age.
longDescription: A box of pre-War packaged snack cakes, filled with a sweet, creamy center. Surprisingly well-preserved despite their age.

name: BlamCo Brand Mac and Cheese
effects: Heals 4 HP
description: A packaged box of dried macaroni pasta and a packet of powdered cheese mix. A pre-War staple that's still perfectly edible decades later.
longDescription: A packaged box of dried macaroni pasta and a packet of powdered cheese mix. A pre-War staple that's still perfectly edible decades later.

name: Mole Rat Meat
effects: Heals 5 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: Meat taken from a mole rat. Not the most appetizing food, but it's edible and provides sustenance.
longDescription: Meat taken from a mole rat. Not the most appetizing food, but it's edible and provides necessary nutrition. Can be cooked to make Mole Rat Chunks.

name: Mutant Hound Meat
effects: Heals 5 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: A cut of meat taken from a dead mutant hound. This meat's off-green color and lumpy texture suggests that it would be quite unpleasant to eat.
longDescription: A cut of meat taken from a dead mutant hound. This meat's off-green color and lumpy texture suggests it would be quite unpleasant to eat. Eaten raw, it contains radiation and is unpalatable.

name: Perfectly Preserved Pie
effects: Heals 5 HP
description: A slice of fruit pie shielded from the radioactive environment since before the Great War. Copious preservatives keep it as edible as the day it was made.
longDescription: A slice of fruit pie preserved within a Port-A-Diner, shielded from radiation since before the Great War. Copious quantities of preservatives keep it as edible as the day it was made.

name: Pork 'n' Beans
effects: Heals 4 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: A can containing a complete meal: beans stewed in a tomato sauce with chunks of cured pork belly. The tin may be slightly rusted, but the contents are still edible.
longDescription: A can containing a complete meal: beans stewed in a tomato sauce with chunks of cured pork belly. The tin may be slightly rusted, but the contents are still edible.

name: Potted Meat
effects: Heals 6 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: A small metal tin of mixed processed meat, typically containing mixtures of meat from brahmin, radstags, mole rats, mongrel dogs, and anything else the maker can get their hands on.
longDescription: A small metal tin of mixed processed meat, typically containing mixtures of brahmin, radstag, mole rat, and mongrel dog, and anything else the maker can get their hands on (some of which may not be fit for human consumption).

name: Radroach Meat
effects: Heals 4 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: Meat taken from a radroach. Not particularly tasty, but it's a common source of protein in the wasteland.
longDescription: Meat from the mutated, irradiated cockroaches known commonly as radroaches. The meat is mildly radioactive and offers little nourishment or satisfaction. Cooking provides only marginal improvement.

name: Radscorpion Meat
effects: Heals 9 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: Meat taken from inside the carapace of a radscorpion, normally from the tail or one of the legs. Difficult to obtain, as it requires killing a radscorpion.
longDescription: Meat taken from inside the carapace of a radscorpion, normally from the tail or legs where it's easier to get to. Difficult to obtain, as it requires killing a radscorpion.

name: Radstag Meat
effects: Heals 8 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: Meat taken from a radstag, a mutated deer-like creature. Lean and gamey, it provides good nutrition.
longDescription: A piece of meat cut from the body of a dead radstag. It's bulky but can produce nutritious and satisfying meals. Can be cooked to make Grilled Radstag or used in Radstag Stew.

name: Squirrel Stew
effects: Heals 10 HP
description: Chunks of squirrel meat, along with carrot, tato, and some bloodleaf, cooked together to create a thick stew. More filling and appetizing than the ingredients individually.
longDescription: Chunks of squirrel meat along with carrot, tato, and some bloodleaf, cooked together to create a thick stew. More filling and appetizing than the ingredients individually.

name: Stingwing Meat
effects: Heals 8 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: Meat taken from the body of a stingwing, a mutated scorpionfly with a nasty sting. Doesn't look especially tasty, but it cooks reasonably well.
longDescription: Meat taken from the body of a stingwing, a mutated scorpionfly with a nasty sting. Doesn't look especially tasty, but it cooks reasonably well once you've pried the exoskeleton off.

name: Sugar Bombs
effects: Heals 4 HP. Gain +1 AP at start of next scene. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: A pre-War breakfast cereal heavily sweetened with sugar. The box may have seen better days, but the contents are still edible, if absurdly sweet.
longDescription: A pre-War breakfast cereal with "explosive great taste", the box contains little cereal shapes resembling stylized atomic bombs coated in copious amounts of sugar. Some boxes claim to contain a prize inside.

name: Sweet Roll
effects: Heals 4 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: A small, sweetened pastry or baked confection normally made as a treat for children or people who need a bit of cheering up.
longDescription: A small, sweetened pastry or baked confection normally made as a treat for children or people who need a bit of cheering up. A comforting find in the harsh wasteland.

name: Yao Guai Meat
effects: Heals 9 HP
description: Dangerous meat to obtain, Yao Guai meat comes from the bodies of slain Yao Guai, a ferocious mutated form of bear that roams the wastelands. The meat is highly prized and nutritious.
longDescription: Another dangerous meat to obtain, Yao Guai meat comes from the bodies of slain Yao Guai, a ferocious mutated form of bear. The meat is highly prized and nutritious.

name: Food Paste
effects: Heals 7 HP. May re-roll 1d20 on all END tests until end of next scene
description: A flavorless mush, garish pink in color, developed by Vault-Tec as part of the Nutritional Alternative Paste Program. Fortified with vitamins and minerals, it remains unspoiled for over a century.
longDescription: A flavorless mush, garish pink in color, developed by Vault-Tec as part of the Nutritional Alternative Paste Program. Fortified with vitamins and minerals, it remains unspoiled for over a century.

name: Institute Food Packet
effects: Heals 5 HP
description: A small white box of food marked with the symbol of the Institute. Each box contains enriched ration bars filled with essential nutrients.
longDescription: A small white box of food marked with the symbol of the Institute. Each box contains enriched ration bars filled with essential nutrients, providing your daily requirements of forty different vitamins, minerals, and nutrients.

name: Dirty Wastelander
effects: Heals 0 HP. Alcoholic. Reduce difficulty of all STR tests by 1 and increase difficulty of all INT tests by 2 (in total)
description: An extremely potent alcoholic beverage, made from a blend of whiskey, Nuka-Cola, and Mutfruit, which has much the same effect as most alcoholic drinks, just moreso.
longDescription: An extremely potent alcoholic beverage, made from a blend of whiskey, Nuka-Cola, and Mutfruit, which has much the same effect as most alcoholic drinks, just moreso.

name: Irradiated Blood
effects: Heals 3 HP. Roll 2 CD rather than 1 for determining Radiation damage when consumed
description: A blood bag filled with discolored—often green—blood-like fluid. About as useful as a normal blood pack, but highly irradiated.
longDescription: A blood bag filled with discolored—often green—blood-like fluid. About as useful as a normal blood pack, but highly irradiated.

name: Glowing Blood Pack
effects: Heals 4 HP. +5 to Radiation damage resistance
description: A blood bag filled with a luminescent green fluid. If you can stomach the acrid, metallic taste, they have potent restorative properties and help protect the body against radiation poisoning for a short while.
longDescription: A blood bag filled with a luminescent green fluid. If you can stomach the acrid, metallic taste, they have potent restorative properties and help protect the body against radiation poisoning for a short while.
